race.comment: TORONESS (6) was well fancied when resuming and proved too strong, scoring by a head over 1100m at this track. Races handy and a 2kg claimer goes aboard. In the right stable (Currie) and fitter she can go on with the job. SNITZOND (3) pushed forward and was claimed late over 1300m at this track. Will again be prominent from the outset and the 2kg claim brings him right into it. PORRISTA (7) led over 1200m here first-up, beaten 1.5 lengths. Keeps Butler and has more to offer. Will have taken benefit from that outing and is also a chance for the Currie barn. WORTHY ENUFF (8) resumes and has been racing in stronger metro company. Has a sharp fresh record and the betting will be key.
